active_work.text: Mission-control metrics remain 25/68 verified, 1 active, 0 blocked, and 1 deferred. The active finish-board row is drmTMB#59 numerical-guard sensitivity; the skew-normal tail-floor source/fit-stress diagnostics, beta/zero-one beta support-floor diagnostic, and residual rho12 open-interval diagnostic are now banked, while random-effect/structured correlation guards, Student-t calibration depth, scale-side guard depth, larger guard grids, and broader intervals remain planned.
